Short Description:
ÉTICA is a sustainable lifestyle brand based in Los Angeles, California, focused on ethically made premium denim and organic knitwear. The company embraces a slow-fashion approach, offering a range of products including various styles of jeans, organic cotton tops, dresses, jumpsuits, and jackets for both men and women. All items are designed with sustainability in mind.

The brand is committed to innovative sustainability practices, featuring its InCloud® Technology, which significantly reduces water and energy consumption during production. ÉTICA operates its own factory in Puebla, Mexico, and adheres to strict ethical standards, holding multiple certifications for responsible manufacturing and environmental practices. The company prioritizes fair wages and training for its workers, ensuring a positive impact on the community.

ÉTICA appeals to fashion-forward individuals who value stylish, durable clothing options that align with their commitment to environmental consciousness and ethical production.

Short Description:
Kaya Unite is a Chilean apparel brand based in the Santiago Metropolitan Region. The company promotes a positive lifestyle focused on outdoor sports, nature conservation, and African-rooted music and culture. Founded with a commitment to high-quality, original clothing designs, Kaya Unite emphasizes eco-friendliness and sustainable practices. It operates physical stores in Chile and has expanded to locations like Seattle, engaging with environmentally conscious communities.

Kaya Unite specializes in wholesale and retail apparel inspired by nature and outdoor adventures. Its product offerings include bottles, vests, polar fleece, beanies, and pants, all designed to support an active, nature-connected lifestyle. The brand is certified as a B Corporation, reflecting its dedication to positive environmental and community impact. Kaya Unite uses 100% recyclable materials and donates profits to provide clothing and sports equipment to those in need. The company employs around 58-63 people and maintains strong relationships with its collaborators and users.

Short Description:
WAPS™ is an Argentine company that designs and manufactures stylish and comfortable footwear for everyday use. The brand focuses on creating shoes that blend elegance with all-day comfort, catering to women who need versatile options for various occasions, including work, travel, and social events.

The core product line features shoes made with exclusive knitting technology, allowing the upper part to adapt flexibly to the foot's shape. WAPS™ shoes include a flexible sole, cushioned insole, and breathable inner lining that absorbs sweat, ensuring durability and comfort. The seamless design prevents irritation, and the shoes are machine washable for easy maintenance. Popular models include Model Lisa, Model One, Model Zen, and several others, with some designated as bestsellers or new releases. WAPS™ also offers free shipping across Argentina and accepts all major credit cards, enhancing the customer experience.

Short Description:
REITE is a Chilean startup founded by four engineers from the University of Chile. The company specializes in Mini Tiendas Autónomas, or autonomous mini-stores, which utilize IoT, hardware, artificial intelligence, and computer vision. These innovative stores aim to enhance the shopping experience by eliminating queues and minimizing purchase friction.

The leadership team includes Sebastián Muñoz as CEO, Simón Sepúlveda as CTO, Daniel Guzmán as Chief Hardware Officer, and Matías Saavedra as Chief Information Officer. REITE's mission is to provide seamless and personalized shopping experiences that save customers time and simplify their daily lives. The company is committed to leading the way in tech entrepreneurship with its advanced solutions.

Vici Mare contributes directly to the planet. More than a brand, it's a lifestyle.

Short Description: Benetton Group es una empresa fundada en Ponzano Veneto, Italia. Su nombre se debe al apellido familiar de sus creadores, quienes la establecieron en 1965. La historia comenzó en 1955 cuando Luciano Benetton, a sus 20 años, trabajando como vendedor de periódicos en Treviso, se dio cuenta que la gente quería colores en sus vidas y especialmente en su ropa. "United Colors of Benetton" ofrece una línea casual, incluyendo vestuario femenino, masculino, infantil y ropa interior. El color de los productos inspira la filosofía de la marca, la cual se basa en el respeto al medio ambiente y a la diversidad. Con campañas publicitarias que abren los ojos de manera positiva a nuestra sociedad, Benetton se ha posicionado como un líder en tendencias.

Short Description:
Etiqueta Negra is a high-end fashion retailer that specializes in premium clothing and accessories for men, women, and unisex styles. Founded in 2003 by Federico Álvarez Castillo and Juan Cahen d'Anvers, the brand is known for its classic, high-quality clothing made from the finest fabrics. The product line includes day and night wear, as well as a range of accessories, all characterized by a clean, logo-free design with a distinctive South American aesthetic.

The company operates stores in Argentina, the USA, Italy, and France, with its U.S. headquarters located in Miami, Florida. Etiqueta Negra positions itself as a lifestyle brand, with connections to polo and classic cars. It sponsors the Ellerstina Polo Team and various prestigious events, including the Gran Premio Nouvolari and the Mille Miglia Storica classic car race. The brand is supported by Compañía Argentina de Diseño S.A. and Amarila, and received private equity investment from Tribeca in 2007 to aid its international expansion.
